mission.title: etcd: go.mod: name packages with go.etcd.io/etcd/v3
mission.description:
Attempt to fix https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/11820

- [x] make works
- [x] ./scripts/genproto.sh makes no changes after running
- [x] make test passes
- [x] ensure bill-of-materials.json is OK
- [x] TEST_OPTS="PASSES='functional'" make test
